description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is primarily white and red, with a blue tail cone and a wooden propeller at the nose. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, with red tips and a white center section. The landing gear is fixed in a taildragger arrangement, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, featuring a clear canopy and side windows. The overall design suggests a light utility or trainer aircraft, suitable for short takeoffs and landings in urban or rural environments.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a red, white, and blue color scheme, fixed taildragger landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red and white fuselage, high-mounted straight wing, blue tail cone, and wooden propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full wingspan, forward propeller, and fixed main landing gear under the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit canopy and tail structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the taildragger landing gear, horizontal stabilizer, and the blue tail cone.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and side windows.
